title: Aegon’s Conquest: The Iron Throne Forged #got #shorts
description: After conquest came creation—the Iron Throne, forged from the weapons of defeated kings. This is how Aegon reshaped Westeros forever. #ASOIAF #Targaryen #Shorts

scenes.narration: After the conquest, Aegon did not just claim power—he forged it into something the world would never forget.
scenes.image_prompt: Aegon standing before mountain of surrendered swords under dark sky, cinematic fantasy, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Kings who once ruled their lands bent the knee, offering their weapons as symbols of defeat.
scenes.image_prompt: defeated kings kneeling and placing swords before Aegon, solemn tone, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Thousands of blades were gathered—each one a reminder of a kingdom that had fallen.
scenes.image_prompt: massive pile of swords forming chaotic structure, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Then Balerion unleashed his fire, melting steel into a single twisted throne.
scenes.image_prompt: dragon breathing fire onto swords as they begin to melt and fuse, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The Iron Throne was not built for comfort—it was built to remind rulers of the cost of power.
scenes.image_prompt: sharp, jagged Iron Throne forming with dangerous edges, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: It cut those who sat upon it, a warning that ruling was never meant to be easy.
scenes.image_prompt: ruler sitting on throne with subtle cuts and blood, symbolic imagery, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: With its creation, the Seven Kingdoms became one—bound under a single rule.
scenes.image_prompt: map of Westeros merging into unified realm under throne symbol, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: But the throne also became the center of future conflict, ambition, and endless struggle.
scenes.image_prompt: multiple shadows reaching toward throne from different directions, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: What Aegon created was not just a kingdom—but a cycle that would define generations.
scenes.image_prompt: timeline of rulers rising and falling around throne, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Because the Iron Throne was never just a seat of power—it was a reminder of how power is taken.
scenes.image_prompt: Iron Throne standing alone in darkness with faint fire glow, cinematic ending, vertical 1080x1920
